subcodes.first_line: O ye servants and handmaidens of God! Your letter, which His Honour Mohsen sent, hath been received and perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان و کنیزان الهی نامه شما را حضرت محسن ارسال فرمودند ملاحظه گردید با
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort
